claims.claim: Puffing Tom and its water-level rail network are introduced.
Aqua Laguna reaches Water 7 and crushes the lower bridge system.
Rocketman departs Water 7 toward Enies Lobby.
Puffing Tom reaches Day Station and Rocketman comes within sight of Enies Lobby.
The two Red Line crossings are explained: abandon the ship for the lawful surface route or use coating to pass beneath through Fish-Man Island.
Rayleigh accepts the coating job and says it will take three days.
The coated Thousand Sunny inflates its resin bubble and submerges.
Coating pressure mechanics and dangers are explained during the descent.
The downward current and Kraken route hazard are encountered.
The crew enters the Underworld of the Sea.
The deep-sea volcanic region is identified.
The volcano erupts and the ship descends the trench to 10,000 meters.
The Paradise-side Red Port and Bondola ascent to Mary Geoise are shown.
Bondolas carry people; sailors do not take their original ships over the Red Line.

cartographic_boundary: The Red Line is a continent encircling the globe. The app may use an irregular rocky coastline for visual truth, but no exact canon zigzag path or survey width is claimed.
